content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic motivation mechanisms from Topic A (curious autonomous agents) can be repurposed to solve the active sampling bottleneck in cutting-edge 2024-2025 SOTA agent memory systems, by having agents self-direct memory pruning and consolidation to prioritize storing unexpected, high-information trajectories that improve future performance more than static heuristic-based memory management. This creates a fully autonomous closed-loop agent that learns what to remember, how to learn, and when to explore without human-labeled training data.
